changeSet.author: hephaestus-auth

preConditions.onFailMessage: ck_auth_event_event_type already admits the #1323 event types
preConditions.sqlCheck: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM pg_constraint WHERE conname = 'ck_auth_event_event_type' AND pg_get_constraintdef(oid) LIKE '%LOGIN_PROVIDER_CHANGED%'

changeSet.comment: Widen ck_auth_event_event_type to admit the issue #1323 event types. The new constraint is a strict superset of the allowed set, so it validates against every existing partition without a data rewrite. Drop+recreate on the partitioned parent cascades to all children.
